_note: This is a TEMPLATE. Copy to config/costs.json (gitignored) and edit there, or point COST_CONFIG_PATH at your own file. Keys beginning with '_' are documentation only and are ignored by the loader. All values are transparent estimates, not billing figures.

_field_definitions.token_pricing.input_price_per_million_to: USD charged per 1,000,000 prompt/input tokens for this model. From the provider's pricing page.
_field_definitions.token_pricing.output_price_per_million_t: USD charged per 1,000,000 completion/output tokens for this model.
_field_definitions.token_pricing.cached_input_price_per_mil: USD per 1,000,000 input tokens served from the provider prompt cache. Cached tokens are a SUBSET of input tokens (clamped to tokens_in), not additional tokens. null = model has no cache discount; all input is billed at the full input rate.
_field_definitions.human_equivalent_hourly_rate_usd: Business-value proxy for one hour of the human work this run assists or compresses. NOT a wage, billing rate, or commitment. Tune to the work context (junior/senior/consultant).
_field_definitions.baseline_hours_per_orchestration_run: Human work-hours typically needed to complete one comparable run WITHOUT the tool. Acts as the floor for the human-equivalent estimate.
_field_definitions.cpu_cost_per_hour_usd: Assumed USD cost of one CPU-core-hour of compute used by a run.
_field_definitions.gpu_cost_per_hour_usd: Assumed USD cost of one GPU-hour of compute used by a run.
_field_definitions.avg_cpu_power_watts: Assumed average CPU power draw (watts) while a run executes; used only for energy/water estimates.
_field_definitions.avg_gpu_power_watts: Assumed average GPU power draw (watts) while a run executes; used only for energy/water estimates.
_field_definitions.water_intensity_l_per_kwh: Assumed liters of water consumed per kWh of energy (datacenter cooling proxy). Highly region-dependent.
_field_definitions.storage_cost_per_gb_month_usd: Assumed USD cost to store 1 GB of run artifacts for one month.
_field_definitions.api_cost_per_1k_tokens_usd: LEGACY blended rate (USD per 1,000 tokens, input+output combined). Used only when no token_pricing block is present. Prefer token_pricing.
_field_definitions.human_hourly_rate_usd: LEGACY name for human_equivalent_hourly_rate_usd. Used only if the v2 field is absent.
_field_definitions.baseline_hours_per_unit: LEGACY name for baseline_hours_per_orchestration_run. Used only if the v2 field is absent.

_section_token_pricing: Model-specific token pricing. Preferred over legacy api_cost_per_1k_tokens_usd.
_section_human_equivalent: Business-value proxy. Not a wage or billing rate. See docs/cost-model.md.
_section_legacy: Legacy fields retained for backward compatibility. Prefer the fields above.
